name: Pretext HTML Motion
description: Build deterministic Pretext-powered kinetic typography, text-flow, glyph-particle, ASCII/text-geometry clips inside Prometheus Creative Video mode using HTML Motion rather than standalone browser demos.

resources.description: Fallback Pretext-like layout shim for HTML Motion clips when remote ESM imports are blocked or when a deterministic local prototype is enough.
Starter HTML Motion document for a vertical 1080x1920 Pretext-style orb reflow clip using the fallback layout shim pattern.
